title: Planning to buy a property? Expert shares hidden costs one should keep in mind while investing
description: Buying a property involves significant hidden costs beyond the initial price. Buyers must account for stamp duty, registration fees, home loan expenses, ongoing maintenance, property taxes, utility deposits, interior furnishing, legal documentation, and miscellaneous charges. Understanding these expenses is crucial for informed financial planning and a smooth homeownership journey.

title: Warren Buffett on Gates Foundation donations: ‘Wish certain things hadn’t happened’

He emphasized waiting for clarity on the situation before making further comments. Buffett also discussed his investment strategy, regretting selling Apple stock too early and downplaying current market volatility.

description: Speaking to reporters in the Oval Office, Trump said, "We'll be leaving very soon," adding that the withdrawal could happen "within two weeks, maybe two weeks, maybe three." The remarks are his clearest yet that Washington is preparing to wind down the month-long war. Trump also said a deal with Tehran is not necessary to bring the conflict to an end.

title: Dallas Cowboys target $26 million Miami Dolphins LB in major NFL trade push
description: The Dallas Cowboys have intensified trade discussions with the Miami Dolphins as they look to fix a struggling defense. After strengthening other areas, linebacker remains a key concern. Team leaders have downplayed urgency publicly, but internal signals suggest otherwise. With roster pressure building, Dallas appears ready to explore bold moves to stay competitive and address its most obvious defensive weakness.

The IRGC claims these firms are responsible for high-tech warfare. Employees and nearby residents are urged to evacuate facilities. This action follows alleged Israeli strikes supported by US intelligence.

Oracle layoffs: Employees in India, US, & other regions receive email at 6am
description: Oracle has initiated widespread global layoffs, impacting employees in the US, India, and other regions without prior notice.  Termination emails, sent directly from leadership, cited organizational changes as the reason, with affected teams seeing significant reductions.  This move is reportedly to fund Oracle's ambitious, debt-financed AI infrastructure expansion, potentially impacting thousands of jobs.

title: Are your kidneys getting damaged silently without any symptoms?
description: Kidney disease often strikes silently, with damage occurring before noticeable symptoms appear. Experts warn that excessive salt, junk food, and unprescribed painkillers can harm kidneys, especially for those with diabetes and hypertension. Early detection through routine check-ups and monitoring blood pressure and sugar are crucial for prevention and managing this silent threat.

title: Brittany Mahomes reacts to Randi’s emotional post on family bond
description: Brittany Mahomes’ induction into the University of Texas at Tyler Athletics Hall of Fame highlights her own athletic journey, separate from her public life today. A former collegiate standout who briefly played professionally in Iceland, she remains connected to her roots. Her heartfelt speech and the support from Randi Mahomes reflect both personal pride and a continued commitment to uplifting women’s sports.

title: Fact check: Did Drew ‘Druski’ Desbordes, Erika Kirk respond to skit?
description: Drew “Druski” Desbordes’ viral skit led to rumors of an online clash with Erika Kirk, but no real interaction happened. A fake screenshot showing comments between them spread on X, but it was proven false. No cease-and-desist was sent, and neither Druski nor Erika Kirk has responded publicly to each other.

title: India prepares for its biggest headcount: What makes Census 2027 different
description: India gears up for Census 2027, a comprehensive, paper-free digital headcount after a decade-long delay. This exercise will include caste enumeration for the first time since 1931 and will be crucial for Lok Sabha delimitation, potentially impacting women's reservation. The digital approach aims for efficiency and transparency.
